steps.title: Collect the x terms
steps.content:
Move the variable terms to one side and constants to the other.
$$6x+4=rx+9$$
$$6x-rx=9-4$$
$$(6-r)x=5$$

steps.title: Create no solution
steps.content:
For no solution, the coefficient of $x$ must be $0$, leaving the false statement $0=5$.
$$6-r=0$$
$$r=6$$
The answer is D.
